objective: Create calculator.py with four arithmetic functions and tests/test_calculator.py with pytest tests.
proposed_prompt: Create a file `calculator.py` at the repo root with functions: add(a,b), subtract(a,b), multiply(a,b), divide(a,b). divide should raise ValueError when b==0. Then create `tests/test_calculator.py` with pytest tests covering all four functions and the zero-division edge case.
risks: No existing test infrastructure assumed. If pytest is not installed, validation will fail.
next_step_framing: After tests pass, consider adding type hints and a CLI wrapper.
